title: Portsmouth's Looking Glass
content:
Methinks I see you, newly risen
From your embroider'd Bed and pissing,
With studied mien and much grimace,
Present yourself before your glass,
To vanish and smooth o'er those graces,
You rubb'd off in your Night Embraces.
meaning:
John Wilmot's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Portsmouth's Looking Glass"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
